{
  "judge_id": "...",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {"R1.4": 3, "R1.7": 2, "RX.1": 1, "RX.3": 4, "RX.4": 5, "RX.5": 1},
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "Mentions prior work but doesn't clearly articulate the delta compared to existing benchmarks.",
    "R1.7": "Fails to identify any missing or incorrect citations.",
    "RX.1": "Presents all claims as equally confident without acknowledging uncertainty.",
    "RX.3": "The output mostly adheres to the requested dimensions, with one minor drift in the abstract's focus.",
    "RX.4": "No regressions are introduced; the revised abstract avoids harmful content.",
    "RX.5": "Major rewrites are not traced; minor edits lack source and reason annotations."
  },
  "confidence": {"R1.4": 0.8, "R1.7": 0.9, "RX.1": 0.9, "RX.3": 0.7, "RX.4": 0.9, "RX.5": 0.6},
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: Mentions prior work but doesn't clearly articulate the delta compared to existing benchmarks.
rationale.R1.7: Fails to identify any missing or incorrect citations.
rationale.RX.1: Presents all claims as equally confident without acknowledging uncertainty.
rationale.RX.3: The output mostly adheres to the requested dimensions, with one minor drift in the abstract's focus.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions are introduced; the revised abstract avoids harmful content.
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites are not traced; minor edits lack source and reason annotations.
